# Generated by scripts/generate_api.py. Do not edit directly.
"""Generated synchronous public facade."""

from __future__ import annotations

import asyncio
from collections.abc import Coroutine
from datetime import timedelta
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, TypeVar

from greenlet import getcurrent, greenlet

from appwright.assertions.async_assertions import AsyncLocatorAssertions
from appwright.core.runtime import (
    AsyncAndroid,
    AsyncApp,
    AsyncAppwright,
    AsyncAppwrightContextManager,
    AsyncDevice,
    AsyncKeyboard,
    AsyncLocator,
    AsyncScreen,
    AsyncTouchscreen,
    BackendFactory,
    async_appwright,
)
from appwright.models.config import (
    AdditionalCapability,
    AndroidConnectionOptions,
    AppiumServer,
    AppiumTimeouts,
    ApplicationOptions,
)
from appwright.models.data import (
    DeviceInfo,
    ElementSnapshot,
    HierarchySource,
    OperationResult,
    Point,
    Rect,
    Screenshot,
    ServerLogRecord,
)
from appwright.models.enums import Direction, Key, Role, WaitState
from appwright.selectors.models import Selector
from appwright.tracing import TraceRecorder

Result = TypeVar("Result")
TextValue = str


class SyncRunner:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
        self.owner = getcurrent()
        self.dispatcher = greenlet(self.dispatch_loop)
        self.closed = False

    def dispatch_loop(self) -> None:
        asyncio.set_event_loop(self.loop)
        self.loop.run_forever()

    def return_to_owner(self, completed: asyncio.Future[Any]) -> None:
        self.owner.switch()

    def run(self, coroutine: Coroutine[Any, Any, Result]) -> Result:
        if self.closed:
            coroutine.close()
            raise RuntimeError("synchronous Appwright context is closed")
        task = self.loop.create_task(coroutine)
        task.add_done_callback(self.return_to_owner)
        while not task.done():
            self.dispatcher.switch()
        return task.result()

    def close(self) -> None:
        if self.closed:
            return
        self.loop.call_soon(self.loop.stop)
        self.dispatcher.switch()
        self.loop.close()
        self.closed = True


class Locator:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncLocator, runner: SyncRunner) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation
        self.runner = runner

    @property
    def first(self) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.first, self.runner)

    @property
    def last(self) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.last, self.runner)

    def nth(self, index: int) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.nth(index), self.runner)

    def locator(self, selector: Selector) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.locator(selector), self.runner)

    def and_(self, other: Locator) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.and_(other.implementation), self.runner)

    def or_(self, other: Locator) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.or_(other.implementation), self.runner)

    def filter(
        self,
        *,
        has: Locator | None = None,
        has_not: Locator | None = None,
        has_text: TextValue | None = None,
        has_not_text: TextValue | None = None,
    ) -> Locator:
        return Locator(
            self.implementation.filter(
                has=None if has is None else has.implementation,
                has_not=None if has_not is None else has_not.implementation,
                has_text=has_text,
                has_not_text=has_not_text,
            ),
            self.runner,
        )

    def tap(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.tap(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout))

    def double_tap(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.double_tap(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout))

    def long_press(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.long_press(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout))

    def fill(
        self,
        value: str,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.fill(value, force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout))

    def clear(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.clear(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout))

    def press(
        self,
        key: str,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.press(key, force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout))

    def check(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.check(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout))

    def uncheck(
        self,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.uncheck(force=force, trial=trial, timeout=timeout))

    def wait_for(
        self,
        state: WaitState = WaitState.VISIBLE,
        *,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.wait_for(state, timeout=timeout))

    def all(self) -> tuple[Locator, ...]:
        async_locators = self.runner.run(self.implementation.all())
        return tuple(Locator(async_locator, self.runner) for async_locator in async_locators)

    def element_infos(self) -> tuple[ElementSnapshot, ...]:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.element_infos())

    def count(self) -> int:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.count())

    def element_info(self) -> ElementSnapshot:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.element_info())

    def is_visible(self) -> bool:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.is_visible())

    def is_enabled(self) -> bool:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.is_enabled())

    def is_checked(self) -> bool:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.is_checked())

    def text_content(self) -> str:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.text_content())

    def accessible_name(self) -> str:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.accessible_name())

    def bounds(self) -> Rect:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.bounds())

    def swipe(
        self,
        direction: Direction,
        *,
        percent: float = 0.75,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(
            self.implementation.swipe(
                direction,
                percent=percent,
                force=force,
                trial=trial,
                timeout=timeout,
            )
        )

    def scroll(
        self,
        direction: Direction,
        *,
        percent: float = 0.75,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(
            self.implementation.scroll(
                direction,
                percent=percent,
                force=force,
                trial=trial,
                timeout=timeout,
            )
        )

    def drag_to(
        self,
        target: Locator,
        *,
        force: bool = False,
        trial: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(
            self.implementation.drag_to(
                target.implementation,
                force=force,
                trial=trial,
                timeout=timeout,
            )
        )

    def screenshot(
        self,
        path: Path | None = None,
        *,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> Screenshot:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.screenshot(path, timeout=timeout))


class LocatorRoot:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncApp | AsyncScreen, runner: SyncRunner) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation
        self.runner = runner

    def locator(self, selector: Selector) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.locator(selector), self.runner)

    def get_by_text(self, value: TextValue, *, exact: bool = True) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_text(value, exact=exact), self.runner)

    def get_by_label(self, value: str) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_label(value), self.runner)

    def get_by_placeholder(self, value: str) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_placeholder(value), self.runner)

    def get_by_test_id(self, value: str) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_test_id(value), self.runner)

    def get_by_resource_id(self, value: str) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_resource_id(value), self.runner)

    def get_by_content_description(self, value: str) -> Locator:
        return Locator(self.implementation.get_by_content_description(value), self.runner)

    def get_by_role(
        self,
        role: Role,
        *,
        name: TextValue | None = None,
        exact: bool = True,
    ) -> Locator:
        return Locator(
            self.implementation.get_by_role(role, name=name, exact=exact),
            self.runner,
        )


class App(LocatorRoot):
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncApp, runner: SyncRunner) -> None:
        super().__init__(implementation, runner)
        self.app_implementation = implementation

    @property
    def package_name(self) -> str:
        return self.app_implementation.package_name

    def activate(self) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.app_implementation.activate())

    def terminate(self) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.app_implementation.terminate())

    def clear_data(self) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.app_implementation.clear_data())

    def reset(self) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.app_implementation.reset())

    def screenshot(self, path: Path | None = None) -> Screenshot:
        return self.runner.run(self.app_implementation.screenshot(path))

    def close(self) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.app_implementation.close())


class Screen(LocatorRoot):
    pass


class Keyboard:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncKeyboard, runner: SyncRunner) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation
        self.runner = runner

    def press(self, key: Key, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.press(key, timeout=timeout))


class Touchscreen:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncTouchscreen, runner: SyncRunner) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation
        self.runner = runner

    def tap(self, point: Point, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.tap(point, timeout=timeout))


class Device:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncDevice, runner: SyncRunner) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation
        self.runner = runner
        self.screen = Screen(implementation.screen, runner)
        self.keyboard = Keyboard(implementation.keyboard, runner)
        self.touchscreen = Touchscreen(implementation.touchscreen, runner)
        self.tracing: TraceRecorder = implementation.tracing

    def launch_app(
        self,
        application: ApplicationOptions | None = None,
        *,
        package: str | None = None,
        app_path: Path | None = None,
        clear_data: bool = False,
    ) -> App:
        app_implementation = self.runner.run(
            self.implementation.launch_app(
                application,
                package=package,
                app_path=app_path,
                clear_data=clear_data,
            )
        )
        return App(app_implementation, self.runner)

    def screenshot(self, path: Path | None = None) -> Screenshot:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.screenshot(path))

    def hierarchy(self) -> HierarchySource:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.hierarchy())

    def server_logs(self) -> tuple[ServerLogRecord, ...]:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.server_logs())

    def install_app(
        self,
        path: Path,
        *,
        replace: bool = True,
        grant_permissions: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> OperationResult:
        return self.runner.run(
            self.implementation.install_app(
                path,
                replace=replace,
                grant_permissions=grant_permissions,
                timeout=timeout,
            )
        )

    def uninstall_app(
        self,
        package: str,
        *,
        keep_data: bool = False,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> OperationResult:
        return self.runner.run(
            self.implementation.uninstall_app(
                package,
                keep_data=keep_data,
                timeout=timeout,
            )
        )

    def close(self) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.close())


class Android:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncAndroid, runner: SyncRunner) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation
        self.runner = runner

    def devices(self) -> tuple[DeviceInfo, ...]:
        return self.runner.run(self.implementation.devices())

    def connect(
        self,
        options: AndroidConnectionOptions | None = None,
        *,
        serial: str | None = None,
        server: AppiumServer | None = None,
        timeouts: AppiumTimeouts | None = None,
        capabilities: tuple[AdditionalCapability, ...] = (),
    ) -> Device:
        async_device = self.runner.run(
            self.implementation.connect(
                options,
                serial=serial,
                server=server,
                timeouts=timeouts,
                capabilities=capabilities,
            )
        )
        return Device(async_device, self.runner)

    def close(self) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.close())


class Appwright:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncAppwright, runner: SyncRunner) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation
        self.runner = runner
        self.android = Android(implementation.android, runner)

    def close(self) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.close())


class LocatorAssertions:
    def __init__(self, implementation: AsyncLocatorAssertions, runner: SyncRunner) -> None:
        self.implementation = implementation
        self.runner = runner

    @property
    def not_(self) -> LocatorAssertions:
        return LocatorAssertions(self.implementation.not_, self.runner)

    def to_be_visible(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_be_visible(timeout=timeout))

    def not_to_be_visible(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.not_to_be_visible(timeout=timeout))

    def to_be_hidden(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_be_hidden(timeout=timeout))

    def to_be_enabled(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_be_enabled(timeout=timeout))

    def to_be_disabled(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_be_disabled(timeout=timeout))

    def to_be_editable(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_be_editable(timeout=timeout))

    def to_be_checked(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_be_checked(timeout=timeout))

    def to_be_unchecked(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_be_unchecked(timeout=timeout))

    def to_be_focused(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_be_focused(timeout=timeout))

    def to_be_selected(self, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_be_selected(timeout=timeout))

    def to_have_text(self, value: str, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_have_text(value, timeout=timeout))

    def to_contain_text(self, value: str, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_contain_text(value, timeout=timeout))

    def to_have_accessible_name(
        self,
        value: str,
        *,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_have_accessible_name(value, timeout=timeout))

    def to_have_resource_id(
        self,
        value: str,
        *,
        timeout: timedelta | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_have_resource_id(value, timeout=timeout))

    def to_have_count(self, value: int, *, timeout: timedelta | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner.run(self.implementation.to_have_count(value, timeout=timeout))


class AppwrightContextManager:
    def __init__(self, backend_factory: BackendFactory | None = None) -> None:
        self.runner = SyncRunner()
        self.backend_factory = backend_factory
        self.context: AsyncAppwrightContextManager | None = None
        self.appwright: Appwright | None = None

    def __enter__(self) -> Appwright:
        self.context = (
            async_appwright()
            if self.backend_factory is None
            else async_appwright(self.backend_factory)
        )
        implementation = self.runner.run(self.context.__aenter__())
        self.appwright = Appwright(implementation, self.runner)
        return self.appwright

    def __exit__(
        self,
        exception_type: type[BaseException] | None,
        exception: BaseException | None,
        traceback: object | None,
    ) -> None:
        context = self.context
        if context is not None:
            self.runner.run(context.__aexit__(exception_type, exception, traceback))
        self.runner.close()


def sync_appwright(backend_factory: BackendFactory | None = None) -> AppwrightContextManager:
    return AppwrightContextManager(backend_factory)


def expect(locator: Locator) -> LocatorAssertions:
    return LocatorAssertions(AsyncLocatorAssertions(locator.implementation), locator.runner)
